description: FireHydrant is an incident management and alerting platform for planning, responding to, and learning from operational incidents. It includes incident workflows, alerts/on-call features, retrospectives, analytics, service catalog, and status pages.
summary: FireHydrant exposes a REST API authenticated with a FireHydrant API key and an npm-distributed local MCP server that also uses that API key; no public GraphQL API or remote MCP endpoint was found.
